output.title: playwright npm metadata
output.text: Public npm metadata checked on 2026-07-13 reports playwright version 1.61.1 with Apache-2.0 license and a high-level API to automate web browsers.

output.note: Ajnas Browser Research is a governed harness, not a browser engine. It records replayable step logs, policy decisions, citations, and provenance bundles around adapter-provided browsing.
